name: Oriental Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the steak with a knife on both sides.
2. Pour the combined remaining ingredients over the steak.
3. Cover; marinate in the refrigerator several hours or overnight, turning once.
4. Place the steak on a greased rack of a broiler pan or greased grill.
5. Broil or grill, uncovered, over hot coals 15-20 minutes, or until desired doneness, turning and brushing with barbecue sauce mixture after 10 minutes.
6. To serve, carve the steak across the grain with a slanted knife into thin slices.
